# Hermit

- **Ability Scores:** Constitution, Wisdom, Charisma
- **Feat:** [[healer]]
- **Skill Proficiencies:** [[medicine]], [[religion]]
- **Tool Proficiency:** [[herbalism_kit]]
- **Equipment:** Choose A or B: (A) [[quarterstaff]], [[herbalism_kit]], [[bedroll]], [[book]] (philosophy), [[lamp]], [[oil]] (3 flasks), [[traveler_s_clothes|Traveler's Clothes]], 16 GP; or (B) 50 GP
